title: Love Yourself
why_this_song: Love Yourself by Justin Bieber (2015) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You should go and love yourself
But when you told me that you hated my friends
The only problem was with you and not them
And every time you told me my opinion was wrong
And I didn't wanna write a song
'Cause I didn't want anyone thinkin' I still care, I don't, but
You still hit my phone up
And baby, I'll be movin' on

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "should" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "should" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "think" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "think" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I didn't wanna write a song
You should go and love yourself
Oh, baby, you should go and love yourself

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Love Yourself" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Love Yourself"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Love Yourself", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Love Yourself", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Love Yourself" was released in 2015. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Love Yourself" foi lançada em 2015. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Justin Bieber one question about "Love Yourself", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Justin Bieber sobre "Love Yourself", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Love Yourself" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Love Yourself" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
